title: Metal-Refining Furnace Operators and Tenders
description: Operate or tend furnaces, such as gas, oil, coal, electric-arc or electric induction, open-hearth, or oxygen furnaces, to melt and refine metal before casting or to produce specified types of steel.

tasks.text: Regulate supplies of fuel and air, or control flow of electric current and water coolant to heat furnaces and adjust temperatures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Draw smelted metal samples from furnaces or kettles for analysis, and calculate types and amounts of materials needed to ensure that materials meet specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Weigh materials to be charged into furnaces, using scales.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record production data, and maintain production logs.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Observe air and temperature gauges or metal color and fluidity, and turn fuel valves or adjust controls to maintain required temperatures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate controls to move or discharge metal workpieces from furnaces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect furnaces and equipment to locate defects and wear.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Drain, transfer, or remove molten metal from furnaces, and place it into molds, using hoists, pumps, or ladles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Kindle fires, and shovel fuel and other materials into furnaces or onto conveyors by hand, with hoists, or by directing crane operators.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare material to load into furnaces, including cleaning, crushing, or applying chemicals, by using crushing machines, shovels, rakes, or sprayers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove impurities from the surface of molten metal, using strainers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe operations inside furnaces, using television screens, to ensure that problems do not occur.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sprinkle chemicals over molten metal to bring impurities to the surface.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct work crews in the cleaning and repair of furnace walls and flooring.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Scrape accumulations of metal oxides from floors, molds, and crucibles, and sift and store them for reclamation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
